info.description: Warehouse Management System API with comprehensive inventory, order, and customer management capabilities
info.title: WMS API

post.description: Authenticate user credentials and return JWT access token for API access
Create a new user account in the system with automatic JWT token generation

get.description: Get a list of all customers in the system with optional filtering and pagination

post.description: Add a new customer to the system

get.description: Search for customers by name or other criteria
Retrieve detailed information for a specific customer
Get a list of all orders in the system with optional filtering and pagination

post.description: Create a new order with items for a customer

get.description: Retrieve all orders for a specific customer
Retrieve detailed information for a specific order including customer and items

put.description: Update an existing order's information and items

delete.description: Remove an order from the system

patch.description: Update the status of an existing order

get.description: Get a list of all products in the system with optional filtering and pagination

post.description: Add a new product to the system

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific product

delete.description: Remove a product from the system

get.description: Get pricing information for a specific product across different customer groups
Get a list of all sales orders in the system

post.description: Add a new sales order to the system

delete.description: Remove a sales order from the system

get.description: Get stock summary with optional filters
Get stock movement history for a product and warehouse
Get a list of all warehouses in the system with optional filtering and pagination

post.description: Add a new warehouse to the system

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific warehouse

delete.description: Remove a warehouse from the system

models.AuthResponse.description: Successful authentication response with JWT token

models.BreakDownRequest.description: Request payload for breaking down products from larger to smaller units

models.PackUpRequest.description: Request payload for packing products from smaller to larger units

models.Product.description: Product information with pricing and inventory details

models.StockAdjustRequest.description: Request payload for adjusting stock levels (corrections)

models.StockInRequest.description: Request payload for adding stock to warehouse

models.StockOutRequest.description: Request payload for removing stock from warehouse

models.TransferRequest.description: Request payload for transferring stock between warehouses

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Document management (Sales Orders, Purchase Orders, etc.)
tags.name: documents
